sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73011" key="o)ligodi/aitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-δίαιτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[δῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73011.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living on little,</tr_> Cephisodor. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1245.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Caryst.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
